# SC-09: Secrets & Credentials Scanning

**Track:** Security Controls (`SC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Scan all code changes in real-time for hardcoded secrets, API keys, passwords, tokens, connection strings, and certificates. Block any commit containing exposed credentials before it enters version control history.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 3 | Coding & Implementation | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Fully automated |
| **Agent does** | Scan every commit for credential patterns; block commits containing matches. |
| **Human does** | Review blocked commits; investigate false positives; remediate confirmed secrets. |

## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Secrets scan result | evidence | Per-commit scan result confirming no credentials detected or listing blocked commits with findings. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Security Architect |

Commits containing secrets are blocked and cannot enter version control. Developer must remove the secret and rotate the credential.

## Dependencies

None

## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 9(4)(c) | Strong authentication and cryptographic key management policies |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Security · **Owner role:** Security Architect
